name: buildmaster-elite-mobile-rn-v1-5-apk-release-offline
description: BuildMaster Elite Mobile React Native/Expo: APK Android release com bundle offline embutido, sem Metro e sem navegador.

scripts.build:apk:debug: npm run prebuild:android && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug
scripts.bundle:android: mkdir -p android/app/src/main/assets && npx react-native bundle --platform android --dev false --entry-file index.js --bundle-output android/app/src/main/assets/index.android.bundle --assets-dest android/app/src/main/res --reset-cache
scripts.build:apk:offline-debug: npm run fix:tsconfig && npm run prebuild:android && npm run bundle:android && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug --no-daemon
scripts.build:apk:offline-release: npm run fix:tsconfig && npm run prebuild:android && npm run bundle:android && cd android && ./gradlew assembleRelease --no-daemon
scripts.build:apk:release-offline: npm run fix:tsconfig && npm run prebuild:android && npm run bundle:android && cd android && ./gradlew assembleRelease --no-daemon
